reviewer: vc-execute-agent (self-review per RIPER-5 EXECUTE phase discipline)
rationale: All Fully-Automated gates (Phase A-E + final regression) pass with zero deviation from the approved plan's touchpoints, public contracts, and locked decisions. The manager-only color authorization asymmetry (color NOT self-editable by reps, unlike name) is implemented at the endpoint level in BOTH the self-branch and other-user branch, and is defense-in-depth verified by 4 Fully-Automated test cases. The Pipeline accent-bar mitigation was implemented exactly per the plan's binding instruction (distinct absolutely-positioned overlay, never inline border-left), verified by direct code inspection of the rendered markup. Two known-gaps remain and are correctly classified as pre-accepted Known-Gap (render-dimension, resolution D) and deferred Hybrid (live-DB round-trip, resolution C) per the validate-contract — neither blocks this plan's phase completion rules. One structural deviation was required: migration 0034 could not be generated via `bun run db:generate` due to a pre-existing, previously-documented drizzle-kit snapshot-chain drift (same blocker #277/migration 0033 hit) — resolved by hand-writing the migration SQL following the exact same precedent already established in this codebase, not a new workaround.
